result.evidence_summary: Multiple websites describe the Baikal Ski Marathon as an annual classic-style cross-country ski event held since 1976, organized by AngarskStroyKomplex and Irkutsk Ski Club, typically on the first Sunday of March with 3 laps in taiga forest near Lake Baikal. Sites like baikalcomplex.com provide detailed course info (elevation 670-805m, 60m climb per lap) and contact details. Distinct from the Baikal Ice Marathon (foot race on ice) and Baikal Race (dog-sled/skijoring), confirming it as a real organized ski event.
